modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be several noticeable typos and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Need to archive OneDrive files from a former employee.

full_description_text: So, there’s this person who used to work at USD. They’re gone now, right? The department wants to get all their files from OneDrive. Like, they need an archive of everything in those folders.
short_description: Need to archive OneDrive files from a former employee.
description: So, there’s this person who used to work at USD. They’re gone now, right? The department wants to get all their files from OneDrive. Like, they need an archive of everything in those folders.
